project: Reminders and Recurrence for ToDowka GTD

L0/L0-1-extend-types.md.title: Extend TypeScript Types
L0/L0-1-extend-types.md.completed_output: Added RecurrenceType, RecurrenceConfig types; extended Task, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate interfaces with reminder_enabled, recurrence_type, recurrence_config, timezone fields; fixed useInbox.ts to include new required fields

L2/L2-1-create-recurrencecalculator.md.title: Create RecurrenceCalculator
L2/L2-1-create-recurrencecalculator.md.completed_output: Created RecurrenceCalculator with calculateNextDueDate, calculateWeeklyNextDate, calculateMonthlyNextDate, and calculateNextReminderTime functions handling all recurrence types and edge cases

L2/L2-2-create-notificationservice.md.title: Create NotificationService
L2/L2-2-create-notificationservice.md.completed_output: Created NotificationService class with init, canShow, requestPermission, show, and showReminder methods handling browser Notification API

L1/L1-1-create-datetimepicker.md.title: Create DateTimePicker
L1/L1-1-create-datetimepicker.md.completed_output: Created DateTimePicker component with date and time inputs, ISO 8601 format output, timezone label display, and proper value handling

L1/L1-2-create-toast.md.title: Create Toast System
L1/L1-2-create-toast.md.completed_output: Created Toast system with useToast hook, ToastContainer component, auto-dismiss after 5 seconds, and proper styling for info/success/warning/error types

L1/L1-3-create-remindersettings.md.title: Create ReminderSettings
L1/L1-3-create-remindersettings.md.completed_output: Created ReminderSettings component with enable checkbox and conditional DateTimePicker display

L1/L1-4-create-recurrencesettings.md.title: Create RecurrenceSettings
L1/L1-4-create-recurrencesettings.md.completed_output: Created RecurrenceSettings component with type selector, weekly day checkboxes, monthly day selector, and proper callback handling

L1/L1-5-create-notificationmanager.md.title: Create NotificationManager
L1/L1-5-create-notificationmanager.md.completed_output: Created NotificationManager component that checks for due reminders every minute, shows browser notifications, tracks notified tasks, and cleans up interval on unmount

L3/L3-1-extend-tasks-api.md.title: Extend Tasks API Client
L3/L3-1-extend-tasks-api.md.completed_output: Added setReminder, setRecurrence, setTimezone methods to tasksAPI and updated complete method to handle recurrence with skipRecurrence parameter

L4/L4-2-update-taskitem.md.title: Update TaskItem
L4/L4-2-update-taskitem.md.completed_output: Updated TaskItem to display reminder, recurrence, and due date with icons and proper styling

L3/L3-2-create-usesetreminder-hook.md.title: Create useSetReminder Hook
L3/L3-2-create-usesetreminder-hook.md.completed_output: Created useSetReminder hook with React Query mutation that calls setReminder API and invalidates tasks cache on success

L3/L3-3-create-usesetrecurrence-hook.md.title: Create useSetRecurrence Hook
L3/L3-3-create-usesetrecurrence-hook.md.completed_output: Created useSetRecurrence hook with React Query mutation that calls setRecurrence API and invalidates tasks cache on success

L3/L3-4-create-usecompletetask-hook.md.title: Create useCompleteTask Hook
L3/L3-4-create-usecompletetask-hook.md.completed_output: Created useCompleteTask hook with skipRecurrence parameter, handles nextTask response, invalidates queries on success

L4/L4-1-update-taskform.md.title: Update TaskForm
L4/L4-1-update-taskform.md.completed_output: Updated TaskForm with extended TaskFormData interface, extended taskSchema validation, DateTimePicker, ReminderSettings, RecurrenceSettings, Timezone selector, and updated form submission

L4/L4-2-update-taskitem.md.title: Update TaskItem
L4/L4-2-update-taskitem.md.completed_output: Updated TaskItem to display reminder, recurrence, and due date with icons and proper styling

L4/L4-3-add-notificationmanager-to-layou.title: Add NotificationManager and Toast to Layout
L4/L4-3-add-notificationmanager-to-layou.completed_output: Added NotificationManager and ToastProvider to RootLayout, created ToastProvider component to manage toasts state

L5/L5-1-test-recurrencecalculator.md.title: Test RecurrenceCalculator
L5/L5-1-test-recurrencecalculator.md.completed_output: Created comprehensive unit tests for RecurrenceCalculator covering daily, weekly, monthly, yearly recurrence and edge cases including leap year handling

L5/L5-2-test-notificationservice.md.title: Test NotificationService
L5/L5-2-test-notificationservice.md.completed_output: Created comprehensive unit tests for NotificationService including init, canShow, requestPermission, show, and showReminder methods with proper mocking

L5/L5-3-e2e-testing.md.title: End-to-End Testing
L5/L5-3-e2e-testing.md.completed_output: Verified development server startup, confirmed NotificationManager and ToastContainer render correctly in layout, validated typecheck passes, all components integrated successfully
